data.name: Nikketa

weaponImprint.name: Guardian Silverwing
weaponImprint.trait: Attacks ignore 1 point of stability index. When possessing [effect:4b5fd3bb-8d4a-44e7-ba99-b48331d2e194], additionally ignore another 1 point of stability index.
weaponImprint.effect:
At the end of this unit's action, applies [effect:659c57a9-357a-4374-9cd4-f62ea54e0a35] to the unit and her [effect:d149d223-ac66-4556-ba25-5d4fef2504e9] for 2 turns.

Ultimate Skill damage is increased by 15%/20%/25%/30%/35%/40%.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Damage against targets with Hydro debuffs is increased by 2.5%. Damage against Sycca Technologies units is increased by 2.5%.

data.effects: A security officer who upholds justice, a kind older sister figure who cherishes children, a big spender who uses up all her monthly earnings - Who is to say that these three identities can't belong to the same person? Nikketa fights on the frontlines of justice, calmly demonstrating her values and beliefs. Yet when she faces you, another side of her emerges. "My work has taught me not to trust anyone. Boss is the exception though. We are fellow partners in the pursuit of justice."

skills.name: Active Deterrence
skills.description: Selects an enemy target within 9 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

skills.name: Kulich's Intimidation
skills.description:
Reduces the attack of enemy units within 5 tiles by 10%.

Note: This skill is inactive until V5.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Reduces the attack of enemy units within 5 tiles by 10%.

summon.name: Kulich
summon.unitInfo: Considered a summon. Inherits 80% of Nikketa's initial HP, 80% of her initial attack, and 100% of her initial defense. It is unable to move and has the passive skill [skillsummon:1226c2d0-bf5b-4290-a848-f20b1211d4c9].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: The range of [skillsummon:1226c2d0-bf5b-4290-a848-f20b1211d4c9] is increased by 2 tiles. [summon:ce93ef16-e26f-4cf0-bc97-950a60f12240] now inherits 100% of Nikketa's HP. [summon:ce93ef16-e26f-4cf0-bc97-950a60f12240] gains a new passive ability [skillsummon:3cc9bdb5-fed7-4db6-a7d5-e428389896b7], which reduces the attack of all enemy units within 5 tiles by 10%.

skills.name: Kulich's Loyalty
skills.description: Will not be automatically targeted by the enemy. If an enemy unit within 3 tiles deals damage, Kulich launches [effect:e6c91f66-b509-4f89-861e-29ca64014622], dealing Hydro damage equal to 80% of attack and 2 points of stability damage to the enemy unit.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Will not be automatically targeted by the enemy. If an enemy unit within 5 tiles deals damage, Kulich launches [effect:e6c91f66-b509-4f89-861e-29ca64014622], dealing Hydro damage equal to 80% of attack and 2 points of stability damage to the enemy unit.

summon.name: Kulich
summon.unitInfo: Considered a summon. Inherits 80% of Nikketa's initial HP, 80% of her initial attack, and 100% of her initial defense. It is unable to move and has the passive skill [skillsummon:1226c2d0-bf5b-4290-a848-f20b1211d4c9].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: The range of [skillsummon:1226c2d0-bf5b-4290-a848-f20b1211d4c9] is increased by 2 tiles. [summon:ce93ef16-e26f-4cf0-bc97-950a60f12240] now inherits 100% of Nikketa's HP. [summon:ce93ef16-e26f-4cf0-bc97-950a60f12240] gains a new passive ability [skillsummon:3cc9bdb5-fed7-4db6-a7d5-e428389896b7], which reduces the attack of all enemy units within 5 tiles by 10%.

skills.name: On-Site Enforcement
skills.description:
When Kulich is on the field, Nikketa gains [effect:4b5fd3bb-8d4a-44e7-ba99-b48331d2e194]. Before Nikketa or Kulich uses their skill, they both gain 1 stack of [effect:93c9cd3c-9579-4f5e-82d3-d0e7a18c9b6f]. If the attack exploits a phase weakness, they additionally gain 1 stack of [effect:93c9cd3c-9579-4f5e-82d3-d0e7a18c9b6f].

Kulich's [effect:e6c91f66-b509-4f89-861e-29ca64014622] can trigger up to once per turn. After Kulich launches a [effect:e6c91f66-b509-4f89-861e-29ca64014622], Nikketa will follow up by using her Ultimate skill Righteous Verdict against the target (this Ultimate skill will not have Confectance Index cost requirement to use).
skills.descriptionLevel2:
When Kulich is on the field, Nikketa gains [effect:4b5fd3bb-8d4a-44e7-ba99-b48331d2e194]. Before she or Kulich uses their skill, they both gain 1 stack of [effect:93c9cd3c-9579-4f5e-82d3-d0e7a18c9b6f]. If the attack exploits a phase weakness, they additionally gain 1 stack of [effect:93c9cd3c-9579-4f5e-82d3-d0e7a18c9b6f].

Kulich's [effect:e6c91f66-b509-4f89-861e-29ca64014622] can trigger up to twice per turn. After Kulich launches a [effect:e6c91f66-b509-4f89-861e-29ca64014622], Nikketa will follow up by using her Ultimate skill Righteous Verdict against the target (this Ultimate skill will not have Confectance Index cost requirement to use).

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: The maximum stacks of [effect:93c9cd3c-9579-4f5e-82d3-d0e7a18c9b6f] is doubled to 10 stacks. Kulich can launch an additional instance of Counterattack once per turn.

skills.name: K9 Deployment
skills.description: Selects one empty tile within 9 tiles and summons [summon:ce93ef16-e26f-4cf0-bc97-950a60f12240], dealing AoE Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to all enemy units within 2 tiles and applying [effect:8816ed39-a814-43fe-82e9-c14ddd6da2de] for 2 turns. If [summon:ce93ef16-e26f-4cf0-bc97-950a60f12240] is already on the battlefield, teleports [summon:ce93ef16-e26f-4cf0-bc97-950a60f12240] to the selected tile instead. Nikketa gains 1 point of Confectance Index.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects one empty tile within 9 tiles and summons [summon:ce93ef16-e26f-4cf0-bc97-950a60f12240], dealing AoE Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to all enemy units within 2 tiles and applying [effect:8816ed39-a814-43fe-82e9-c14ddd6da2de] for 2 turns. If [summon:ce93ef16-e26f-4cf0-bc97-950a60f12240] is already on the battlefield, teleports [summon:ce93ef16-e26f-4cf0-bc97-950a60f12240] to the selected tile and recovers 30% of its Max HP for [summon:ce93ef16-e26f-4cf0-bc97-950a60f12240]. Nikketa gains 1 point of Confectance Index.
skills.descriptionLevel3: Selects one empty tile within 9 tiles and summons [summon:ce93ef16-e26f-4cf0-bc97-950a60f12240], dealing AoE Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to all enemy units within 2 tiles and applying [effect:8816ed39-a814-43fe-82e9-c14ddd6da2de] for 2 turns. If [summon:ce93ef16-e26f-4cf0-bc97-950a60f12240] is already on the battlefield, teleports [summon:ce93ef16-e26f-4cf0-bc97-950a60f12240] to the selected tile and recovers 30% of its Max HP for [summon:ce93ef16-e26f-4cf0-bc97-950a60f12240]. Nikketa gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Stability damage is increased by 2 points. The effect of [effect:8816ed39-a814-43fe-82e9-c14ddd6da2de] is changed: Hydro damage taken multiplier is increased to 10%. After teleporting, recovers 30% of its map HP for [summon:ce93ef16-e26f-4cf0-bc97-950a60f12240].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: The range of [skillsummon:1226c2d0-bf5b-4290-a848-f20b1211d4c9] is increased by 2 tiles. [summon:ce93ef16-e26f-4cf0-bc97-950a60f12240] now inherits 100% of Nikketa's HP. [summon:ce93ef16-e26f-4cf0-bc97-950a60f12240] gains a new passive ability [skillsummon:3cc9bdb5-fed7-4db6-a7d5-e428389896b7], which reduces the attack of all enemy units within 5 tiles by 10%.

skills.name: Judgment Strike
skills.description: Selects one enemy target within 9 tiles, dealing Hydro damage equal to 80% of attack to it and applies [effect:8816ed39-a814-43fe-82e9-c14ddd6da2de] for 2 turns. Nikketa gains 2 points of Confectance Index and [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb].
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects one enemy target within 9 tiles, dealing Hydro damage equal to 100% of attack to it and applies [effect:8816ed39-a814-43fe-82e9-c14ddd6da2de] for 2 turns. Nikketa gains 2 points of Confectance Index and [effect:3fbcb8ae-7ffa-4e2e-9dce-1269da8ff4d2].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Damage multiplier is increased by 20%. [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb] is replaced with [effect:3fbcb8ae-7ffa-4e2e-9dce-1269da8ff4d2].

skills.name: Righteous Verdict
skills.description: Selects one enemy target within 9 tiles, dealing Hydro damage equal to 130% of attack to it. If the target has [effect:8816ed39-a814-43fe-82e9-c14ddd6da2de], performs an additional attack and removes [effect:8816ed39-a814-43fe-82e9-c14ddd6da2de]. Expends all points of Confectance Index. Each additional point of Confectance Index spent increases the damage of this skill by 5%.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects one enemy target within 9 tiles, dealing Hydro damage equal to 150% of attack to it. If the target has [effect:8816ed39-a814-43fe-82e9-c14ddd6da2de], performs another attack and removes [effect:8816ed39-a814-43fe-82e9-c14ddd6da2de]. Applies [effect:1737d61d-fd64-4be8-84bc-9217e9fd7417] to it for 1 turn after using this skill. Expends all points of Confectance Index. Each additional point of Confectance Index spent increases the damage of this skill by 5%.
skills.descriptionLevel3: Selects one enemy target within 9 tiles, dealing Hydro damage equal to 150% of attack. If the target has [effect:8816ed39-a814-43fe-82e9-c14ddd6da2de], performs an additional attack and applies [effect:1737d61d-fd64-4be8-84bc-9217e9fd7417] to it for 1 turn after using this skill. Expends all points of Confectance Index. Each additional point of Confectance Index spent increases the damage of this skill by 10%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Damage multiplier increases by 20%. Confectance Index expenditure is reduced by 1 point. If the target has [effect:8816ed39-a814-43fe-82e9-c14ddd6da2de], applies [effect:1737d61d-fd64-4be8-84bc-9217e9fd7417] to it for 1 turn after using this skill.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: For each additional point of Confectance Index spent, damage is increased by 10% instead. [effect:8816ed39-a814-43fe-82e9-c14ddd6da2de] is no longer removed.

keys.effect: When this unit has a Hydro buff, critical rate is increased by 10%.

After the end of the action, gains 1 stack of [effect:31ae4933-095f-4ba3-b73b-1c73d4e4d86f].

For every 1 time Kulich performs a [effect:e6c91f66-b509-4f89-861e-29ca64014622] , Nikketa recovers 1 point of Confectance Index. The range of [skillsummon:1226c2d0-bf5b-4290-a848-f20b1211d4c9] is increased by 2 tiles.
keys.displayTitle: Expansion Key - Justice Is Always With You

keys.effect: After using a basic attack or a targeted skill, gains 1 point of Confectance Index.
If the target has [effect:8816ed39-a814-43fe-82e9-c14ddd6da2de], deals an additional 2 points of stability damage to it.
The active skill Judgement Strike is changed to an AoE skill, and it deals AoE Hydro damage equal to 80% of attack to all targets within 2 tiles.
After using the active skill K9 Deployment, generates [effect:a7a2cc2b-3078-4d27-bafc-f20b389335c0] within the skill's area of effect for 2 turns.
If the target is in Stability Break after the attack, applies [effect:e82fca4c-de4a-40b6-83c2-e84d716f72d3] to it for 1 turn.
When gaining [effect:93c9cd3c-9579-4f5e-82d3-d0e7a18c9b6f], Nikketa gains [effect:13704d31-93dc-41f4-8ae8-52bf9ceb0a06] for 1 turn.

vertebrae.effect: Damage multiplier is increased by 20%. [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb] is replaced with [effect:3fbcb8ae-7ffa-4e2e-9dce-1269da8ff4d2].

doll.name: Nikketa
doll.effects: A security officer who upholds justice, a kind older sister figure who cherishes children, a big spender who uses up all her monthly earnings - Who is to say that these three identities can't belong to the same person? Nikketa fights on the frontlines of justice, calmly demonstrating her values and beliefs. Yet when she faces you, another side of her emerges. "My work has taught me not to trust anyone. Boss is the exception though. We are fellow partners in the pursuit of justice."

doll.effects: A security officer who upholds justice, a kind older sister figure who cherishes children, a big spender who uses up all her monthly earnings - Who is to say that these three identities can't belong to the same person? Nikketa fights on the frontlines of justice, calmly demonstrating her values and beliefs. Yet when she faces you, another side of her emerges. "My work has taught me not to trust anyone. Boss is the exception though. We are fellow partners in the pursuit of justice."

skillsLevel3.name: Righteous Verdict
skillsLevel3.description: Selects one enemy target within 9 tiles, dealing Hydro damage equal to 130% of attack to it. If the target has [effect:8816ed39-a814-43fe-82e9-c14ddd6da2de], performs an additional attack and removes [effect:8816ed39-a814-43fe-82e9-c14ddd6da2de]. Expends all points of Confectance Index. Each additional point of Confectance Index spent increases the damage of this skill by 5%.
skillsLevel3.descriptionLevel2: Selects one enemy target within 9 tiles, dealing Hydro damage equal to 150% of attack to it. If the target has [effect:8816ed39-a814-43fe-82e9-c14ddd6da2de], performs another attack and removes [effect:8816ed39-a814-43fe-82e9-c14ddd6da2de]. Applies [effect:1737d61d-fd64-4be8-84bc-9217e9fd7417] to it for 1 turn after using this skill. Expends all points of Confectance Index. Each additional point of Confectance Index spent increases the damage of this skill by 5%.
skillsLevel3.descriptionLevel3: Selects one enemy target within 9 tiles, dealing Hydro damage equal to 150% of attack. If the target has [effect:8816ed39-a814-43fe-82e9-c14ddd6da2de], performs an additional attack and applies [effect:1737d61d-fd64-4be8-84bc-9217e9fd7417] to it for 1 turn after using this skill. Expends all points of Confectance Index. Each additional point of Confectance Index spent increases the damage of this skill by 10%.

summons.name: Kulich
summons.unitInfo: Considered a summon. Inherits 80% of Nikketa's initial HP, 80% of her initial attack, and 100% of her initial defense. It is unable to move and has the passive skill [skillsummon:1226c2d0-bf5b-4290-a848-f20b1211d4c9].
summons.unitInfoLevel2: Considered a summon. Inherits 100% of Nikketa's initial HP, 80% of her initial attack, and 100% of her initial defense. It is unable to move and has the passive skills [skillsummon:1226c2d0-bf5b-4290-a848-f20b1211d4c9] and [skillsummon:3cc9bdb5-fed7-4db6-a7d5-e428389896b7].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: The range of [skillsummon:1226c2d0-bf5b-4290-a848-f20b1211d4c9] is increased by 2 tiles. [summon:ce93ef16-e26f-4cf0-bc97-950a60f12240] now inherits 100% of Nikketa's HP. [summon:ce93ef16-e26f-4cf0-bc97-950a60f12240] gains a new passive ability [skillsummon:3cc9bdb5-fed7-4db6-a7d5-e428389896b7], which reduces the attack of all enemy units within 5 tiles by 10%.

skills.name: Kulich's Loyalty
skills.description: Will not be automatically targeted by the enemy. If an enemy unit within 3 tiles deals damage, Kulich launches [effect:e6c91f66-b509-4f89-861e-29ca64014622], dealing Hydro damage equal to 80% of attack and 2 points of stability damage to the enemy unit.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Will not be automatically targeted by the enemy. If an enemy unit within 5 tiles deals damage, Kulich launches [effect:e6c91f66-b509-4f89-861e-29ca64014622], dealing Hydro damage equal to 80% of attack and 2 points of stability damage to the enemy unit.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: The range of [skillsummon:1226c2d0-bf5b-4290-a848-f20b1211d4c9] is increased by 2 tiles. [summon:ce93ef16-e26f-4cf0-bc97-950a60f12240] now inherits 100% of Nikketa's HP. [summon:ce93ef16-e26f-4cf0-bc97-950a60f12240] gains a new passive ability [skillsummon:3cc9bdb5-fed7-4db6-a7d5-e428389896b7], which reduces the attack of all enemy units within 5 tiles by 10%.

skills.name: Kulich's Intimidation
skills.description:
Reduces the attack of enemy units within 5 tiles by 10%.

Note: This skill is inactive until V5.

imagoforms.effect: Damage dealt to enemy units with Hydro debuffs is increased by 5%.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Hydro damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt to enemy targets in Stability Break is increased by 10%.
Damage dealt against enemy units that are more than 5 tiles away is increased by 12%.

{"mainDetails":"

Damage dealt by [effect:93f91944-fc00-410d-995a-74155802def7]'s attacks is further increased by 5%, maximum of 5 stacks. Considered a Hydro buff, cannot be cleansed.

Damage dealt by [effect:93f91944-fc00-410d-995a-74155802def7]'s attacks is further increased by 5%, maximum of 10 stacks. Considered a Hydro buff, cannot be cleansed.

{"mainDetails":"

The debuff holder takes 5% more Hydro damage from Nikketa and Kulich. Considered a Hydro debuff, cannot be cleansed.

","upgrades":[{"id":"c6e8bf98-7ac4-4202-9aad-448a0c0ab21e","upgradeName":"V4","upgradeDetails":"

The debuff holder takes 10% more Hydro damage from Nikketa and Kulich. Considered a Hydro debuff, cannot be cleansed.

","order":0}]}

Nikketa's critical rate is increased by 30% and critical damage is increased by 30%. When manually using the Ultimate Skill [dollSkill:80da8a10-46a2-427e-9f31-5d594905de2d], consumes 5 stacks of this effect to perform the Ultimate skill 1 additional time. Can stack up to 5 times. This effect cannot be cleansed.

When dealing damage to an enemy unit, the debuff holder takes 2 points of stability damage. Additionally, damage taken from Kulich's counter attack is increased by 15%. Considered a Hydro debuff, cannot be cleansed.
